description.value:
Trigger A non-fey, non-shobhad creature passes the room's center

Effect The spirits howl in rage, dealing @Damage[2d4[mental]] damage to the triggering creature (@Check[will|dc:20|basic] save). On a critical failure, that creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Deafened] for 1 round. The hazard then rolls initiative.

details.description: The paintings weep blackness outward until they create shadows from floor to ceiling.
details.disable: @Check[acrobatics|dc:20] (trained) to divert the energy of the spirits against each other, @Check[athletics|dc:18] (trained) to [[/act grapple]] the spirits, or @Check[religion|dc:18] or @Check[occultism|dc:18] (trained) to soothe the restless souls; two successes are required to disable the hazard.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-15: Ruins of the World Soul

details.routine:
(1 action) Shadowy hands lunge from the walls to drag down creatures in the room. The hazard attempts an Athletics check with a [[/gmr 1d20+12 #Athletics]]{+12} modifier against the Fortitude DC of up to two different creatures in the room.

Critical Success The target takes @Damage[(2d10+4)[bludgeoning]] damage, is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone], and is pushed 10 feet toward the nearest wall. It can't breathe or speak until it ends the prone condition.

Success The target takes @Damage[(1d10+4)[bludgeoning]] damage and is pushed 5 feet toward the nearest wall.
